case_title: MONIKA TROBITS VS. THE CLOSET FACTORY, INC. A CALIF. CORP.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TROBITS, MONIKA AS TO DEFENDANT THE CLOSET FACTORY, INC. A CALIF. CORP. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TROBITS, MONIKA AS TO DEFENDANT THE CLOSET FACTORY, INC. A CALIF. CORP.
